summary: GS1 Business Identifiers feature fully tested - Backend 100% (27/27 tests passed), Frontend 100% (all UI elements verified). All GS1 validation, protected owner identifiers, and mandatory enforcement working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: GS1 validators correctly implement Modulo-10 check digit verification for GTIN, GLN, UPC
Protected owner identifiers (John LeGerron Spivey / Big Mann Entertainment) are immutable and locked
Asset creation correctly rejects missing or invalid GTIN with proper error messages
Distribution endpoint creation correctly requires GLN and GS1 Company Prefix
Business Identifiers page shows 'Immutable Ownership Protection Active' banner for protected owner
All identifier fields show lock icons when protected
Compliance badge shows 'Fully Compliant' when all identifiers present
GS1 Licensing Hub has 'Manage GS1 & Business Identifiers' link
Navigation bar has 'GS1 & Business IDs (Mandatory)' link in Business dropdown
GTIN field in asset form is marked as mandatory with red asterisk
Frontend validation shows 'GTIN is required for every catalog asset' error
seed_data_creation: Created test assets via pytest with valid GTIN (00860004340201) and test distribution endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: GS1 Business Identifiers feature fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/gs1-identifiers/protected-owner (returns immutable Big Mann Entertainment identifiers), POST /api/gs1-identifiers/validate (validates GTIN/GLN/ISRC/UPC/EIN/DUNS with check-digit), GET/PUT /api/gs1-identifiers/labels/{label_id} (CRUD for label identifiers), GET /api/gs1-identifiers/labels/{label_id}/compliance (compliance check). Asset creation at POST /api/uln/labels/{label_id}/catalog/assets requires valid GTIN. Endpoint creation at POST /api/uln/labels/{label_id}/endpoints requires GLN and GS1 Company Prefix. Frontend: /business-identifiers page shows all identifiers with lock icons for protected owner, compliance badge, and GS1 standards info. Test credentials: owner@bigmannentertainment.com / Test1234!. Protected User ID: 0659dd6d-e447-4022-a05a-f775b1509572. Label ID: BM-LBL-9D0377FB. Valid GTIN for testing: 00860004340201 (14-digit with correct check digit).
